title: spells and magic
description: a mod that adds A lot of magic and fun to the game!
body:
This mod is a lot of fun to play with friends and in single player.

It includes a lot of things.

## spell books

- Book of Wind

- Book of Fire

- Book of Fangs

- Book of Explosions

- Book of Protection

## wands

- Spell Wand

- Controlling Wand

## items

- Mind Orb

- book of magic

## blocks

- absorber

- magic book container

- magic pot

## structures

- magic temple

- magic book temple

## recipes

![spell wand](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7bd51e7eea1ae12c73955e2e75579def61bd4c37.png)

![controlling wand](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d00fbe10161db6cab2264309974f59a669533f35.png)

![absorber](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a1a68815d58490524f2677b24a91a7f7e66f9108.png)

### others

- Is Magical - attribute

- magic [player] - command


<details>
<summary>Uses</summary>

- Book of Wind

  When put inside of the **spell wand**, it launches you up when using the **spell wand**.

 

- Book of Fire

  When put inside of the **spell wand**, it puts lava on the ground and gives you fire  
  resistance when Using the **spell wand**, after 3 seconds, the latest lava you placed and the 
  effect disappear's. 

 

- Book of Fangs

  When put inside of the **spell wand**, it launches a row of fangs in the direction the player 
  is looking at when using the **spell wand**

 

- Book of Explosions

    When put inside of the **spell wand**, it summons an explosion in the direction the player 
    is looking at when using the **spell wand** 

- book of protection

  When put inside of the **spell wand**, it makes you invincible for 5 minutes.

  when using the **spell wand**

- spell wand

  - **To place spells inside**, use left click to open the **spell wand**'s menu and drag your

      **spell book** into the spell slot, you also have storage for your other spells.

  - **to use spells** Use right-click to use your equipped spell.

- controlling wand

  - **To add an animal to your teleport**, use the _left-click_ on it.

    If it's added, the animal will glow.

  - **To choose the block to teleport to**, use _right-click_ on it.

  - **To teleport the animal to the chosen block**, use _C_.

  

- mind orb

  - used to craft the **controlling wand**

  - obtained by using the beacon in the **absorber** block

- book of magic

  used to give the player the ability to use the **spell wand** and the **controlling wand**

- absorber

  When a beacon is placed inside it, it gives a **mind orb** 5 obsidian and 3 glass.

- magic book container

  contains the **book of magic**

- magic pot

  contains 1-3 of the **spell books**

- magic temple

  contains a **magic pot**

- magic book temple

  contains a **magic book container**

- magic [player]

  gives the player a **spell wand** and all of the **spell books**

- Is Magical

  states if the player is magical or not

</details>
